title: Jiǎoluò Shūwū Content Entry
description: Frontmatter schema for all content files in content/

char.description: character entries only — the single hanzi

hsk.description: HSK level (integer), range (object with from/to), or null for characters outside the HSK corpus

radical.description: character entries only — the radical hanzi

trad.description: Traditional form of the character; omit if identical to simplified

metaDesc.description: SEO meta description override; falls back to desc if absent. Prefer seo_desc for new pages.

pageTitle.description: HTML <title> content (before ' | Jiǎoshū'); auto-generated if absent. Prefer seo_title for new pages.

seo_title.description: Hand-tuned SERP title for pages we want to win specific English-language queries. Leads with pinyin (or the searched English term), carries a concrete hook, and stays under 60 chars. See templates/_drafting/SEO.md for the full pattern.

seo_desc.description: Hand-tuned SERP description, written as a complete-sentence answer to the natural-language query the page targets. 90-155 chars; longer gets truncated, shorter gets rewritten by Google. See templates/_drafting/SEO.md.

topic.description: Optional thematic grouping label (deprecated — use tags instead)

sources.description: Optional list of sources cited; rendered as a small footer block on the page

content_review.description: Content review status covering factual accuracy, voice, and alignment. 'verified' requires non-empty content_sources. All complete pages must set this field.

content_sources.description: Sources consulted when reviewing content claims (e.g. 'Outlier', 'Wenlin', 'Shuōwén', 'Baxter-Sagart OC', 'CC-CEDICT'). Required when content_review: verified.

related.description: Optional explicit related entry slugs (e.g. 'characters/gan3_感') that are merged at the front of the auto-computed related list

family.description: Family-index pages only (category: 'families'). Tells the build which entry-grids to inject into the page body marker. 'explore' is the master hub showing all three family cards.

faq.description: Optional FAQ items rendered as a visible <details> section + FAQPage JSON-LD. Use to capture long-tail question queries from GSC.

share.description: Optional carousel-exporter overrides. When present, /pages/share/ uses these instead of auto-extracted prose, so a curated post reads like an actual hook → payoff → CTA instead of a TOC.

hook.description: Title-slide opener: a question, claim, or contrast that earns the swipe.

beats.description: Payoff beats, one per slide. Keep each under ~180 chars so the canvas wrap stays clean.

cta.description: Final-slide call to action. Default is the page URL — override for 'follow for more', 'save this', etc.

stages.description: Hub pages only — ordered reading stages, each with member entries.
